serviceTiers.name: Tier 1: Essential Home
serviceTiers.focus: Recurring household rituals such as Lakshmi and Satyanarayan puja.

serviceTiers.name: Tier 2: Grand Event
serviceTiers.focus: Weddings, sacred thread, grihoprobesh, and milestone rituals.

serviceTiers.name: Tier 3: Barwari / Public
serviceTiers.focus: Community Durga, Kali, and locality-level puja management.

serviceTiers.name: Tier 4: Monthly Trustee
serviceTiers.focus: Recurring temple, society, and complex priest scheduling.

controls.label: Manual KYC approval
controls.description: Priest verification stays human-reviewed before any live visibility.

controls.label: OTP-based completion
controls.description: Final completion and referral settlement depend on OTP verification.

controls.label: Replacement guarantee flow
controls.description: Admin-assisted reassignment is available for verified priest failure cases.

controls.label: Public listing auto-approval
controls.description: New priests are published automatically after signup.
